Document:
# Specific Role Rule 3: Security
- Follow space law, it is in your favor. - Declare your intent before taking action. Don't just open fire immediately. - The only Exception to this is during emergencies (Code Red) or when directly ordered by command. - Do not use contraband as security roles unless there is an immidiate round ending threat (blob, zombies, nukies, or ascended heretic). - Beatings are fine if the offender deserves them. - Remember to escalate.
